name: Suspicious Service Path Modification Detected
description: Detection of a service path modification to use PowerShell or CMD. Adversaries may modify a legitimate service to execute a command or a script, which is a common persistence and execution technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: the process **`sc.exe`** was used to modify a service path to execute **`powershell`** or **`cmd`**. This is a strong indicator of a **Service Command** attack (**MITRE ATT&CK T1569.002**) where an adversary is attempting to establish **Persistence** by hijacking a legitimate service. The command line was **{command}** and the event occurred under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to restore the integrity of the affected service.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
